# app-10978-span — scripts

Get pending entrys in spreadsheets. Use when tracking archived field changes, tracking secondary conversion changes, tracking retrying record changes, tracking pending setting changes. Returns matching snapshots with metadata. Supports filtering by deleted tag fields.
